response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified the first song as 'Hibikase' by Reol based on audio. Performer identified as Ouro Kronii and Kaela Kovalskia. 
2. Identified the second song as 'The Biggest Dreamer' (Opening theme for Digimon Tamers) by Koji Wada based on audio and lyrics. Performers identified as Hakos Baelz, Kaela Kovalskia, and Hoshimachi Suisei. 
3. Performed web searches for both songs to get lyrics and English translations. Used simple queries like: '"Hibikase" Reol Japanese and English lyrics' and '"The Biggest Dreamer" Koji Wada Japanese and English lyrics'. 
4. Compiled data into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: The video is a two-song musical performance featuring Hololive VTubers. It starts with Ouro Kronii and Kaela Kovalskia performing 'Hibikase', followed by a short skit in a classroom, and ends with a performance of 'The Biggest Dreamer' by Hakos Baelz, Kaela Kovalskia, and Hoshimachi Suisei.

scenes.description: Ouro Kronii and Kaela Kovalskia perform 'Hibikase' on a stage with a futuristic city background.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Mayonaka, meiro ga tsuzuku
Kyou no oto, asayake ni
Fureta netsu ga
Yubisaki de odoridasu
Kankaku kasoku
Kyoumei ni oborete iku
Hibikaseba, sekai ga kawaru
Anata no unda oto ni, tada koi wo shite ita no
Kanashimi, ikari, kanshin, subete uchinarasu
Zutto sakende, mou kowaku wa nai
Hibike, hibike, kokoro ga hibike
Wanna be the biggest dreamer
Zensokuryoku de mirai mo
Ima mo kakenukero
Sore ga kotae daro
Dare yori tooku e tonde miseru yo
Subete no asu wo tsuranuite
Chiheisen made tonde yuke
Hane wo moratta yuuki-tachi
Tsuyoku ookiku naru tame ni
Boku mo hashiridasou.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
In the middle of the night, a melody follows
Today's sound, early in the morning
The warmth you touch
Dancing on my fingertips
Sensory acceleration
Intoxicated by the consonance
If I let it resonate, the world will change
I've been in love with the sound you created
Sadness, anger, everything is swallowed up
Continuously shouting, 'cause I'm not afraid anymore
It's resounding, resounding, my heart is resounding
I'm just a daydreamer, but I want to fly further than anyone else
Even the future, even the present, I'll run through it all
That's the answer, isn't it?
I'll show you, I'll fly far beyond anyone else
Piercing through every tomorrow
Running full speed, towards the horizon
With the courage I've been given
So that I can grow stronger, I'll start running too.

scenes.description: A skit in a classroom with Kaela Kovalskia talking.
Hakos Baelz, Kaela Kovalskia, and Hoshimachi Suisei perform 'The Biggest Dreamer' on a city street.
scenes.performer_in_video: Hakos Baelz, Kaela Kovalskia, and Hoshimachi Suisei
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Wanna be the biggest dreamer
Zensokuryoku de mirai mo ima mo kakenukero
Sou boku wa kizuitanda
Zutto shukudai wasureteta
Sore wa hitotsu no nazo na, nazo na, nazo na
'Boku wa dare?'
Kotae sagasu, kotae sagasu, kotae sagasu
Shinjitsu wa dokoka ni kakureteru
Dare yori tooku e tonde miseru yo
Subete no asu wo tsuranuite
Chiheisen made tonde yuke
Hane wo moratta yuuki-tachi
Tsuyoku ookiku naru tame ni
Boku mo hashiridasou.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Wanna be the biggest dreamer
Running full speed through both the future and the present
That's right, I've realized it
I forgot to do my homework
That's one puzzle, puzzle, puzzle, 'Who am I?'
Looking for an answer, answer, answer
I have to find the truth, it's hidden somewhere
I'll show you, I'll fly far beyond anyone else
Piercing through every tomorrow
Running full speed, towards the horizon
With the courage I've been given
So that I can grow stronger, I'll start running too.
